projectName: MASH E-Commerce - Consumer Side Development v2 (COD-Only)
description: Complete consumer-side features: Wishlist Firebase sync, cancel order, delivery tracking, Lalamove production setup, shop pagination, comprehensive tests. Payment is COD-ONLY.

successMetrics.build: npm run build passes with zero errors
successMetrics.tests: All test suites pass with 0 failures
successMetrics.lint: npm run lint passes with zero warnings
successMetrics.typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors in src/

stories.title: Wishlist Firebase Sync for Authenticated Users
acceptanceCriteria: WishlistContext uses useAuth to detect logged-in users
On login: merge cookie wishlist IDs into Firestore via FirebaseWishlistService.mergeLocalStorageWishlist
Subscribe to real-time Firestore wishlist updates via subscribeToWishlist
On wishlist change (add/remove): sync to Firestore with 500ms debounce
On logout: unsubscribe from Firestore listener, keep cookie wishlist
Guest users continue using cookie-only wishlist (no regression)
Cross-tab sync still works via cookie polling for guests

stories.title: Cancel Order Button in Order History
acceptanceCriteria: Cancel button visible on orders with status: pending_approval, approved, processing
Cancel button NOT visible on shipped, delivered, completed, cancelled, rejected orders
Confirmation dialog before cancellation with optional reason input
Calls FirebaseOrdersService.cancelOrder(orderId, userId, reason)
Toast notification on success/failure
Order status updates in real-time after cancellation

stories.title: Track Order Link in Order Detail Dialog
acceptanceCriteria: Track Delivery button visible in OrderDetailDialog for shipped/processing/ready_for_pickup orders with delivery method
Links to existing /profile/orders/[orderId]/track page
Button not visible for pickup orders or non-trackable statuses

stories.title: Wishlist Firebase Sync Unit Tests
acceptanceCriteria: Test merge on login (cookie items synced to Firestore)
Test real-time subscription updates wishlist state
Test unsubscribe on logout
Test guest mode still works (cookie-only)
Test clear Firebase wishlist for authenticated users
All 36 tests passing

stories.title: Cancel Order and Tracking Link Tests
acceptanceCriteria: Test cancel button visibility for cancellable statuses (pending_approval, approved, processing)
Test cancel button NOT visible for non-cancellable statuses (shipped, delivered, cancelled, rejected, ready_for_pickup)
Test confirmation dialog flow with reason input
Test FirebaseOrdersService.cancelOrder called with correct args
Test error toast on cancel failure
Test track delivery link for shipped delivery orders
Test track NOT shown for pickup orders
All 15 tests passing

stories.title: Lalamove Production Setup Guide and Environment Configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Create comprehensive Lalamove production setup guide at .github/LALAMOVE_PRODUCTION_GUIDE.md
Document step-by-step process to get production API keys from Lalamove
Document .env variable changes needed (LALAMOVE_HOST, LALAMOVE_API_KEY, LALAMOVE_API_SECRET)
Document Railway dashboard environment variable updates
Include API endpoint differences between sandbox and production
Include testing checklist for production validation
Document vehicle type selection already available in vehicle-types.ts
Include troubleshooting guide for common HMAC signature errors

stories.title: Add Vehicle Type Selection to Checkout Delivery
acceptanceCriteria: Show vehicle type options during Lalamove delivery selection in checkout
Display vehicle name, weight limit, size limit, and estimated base fare
Default to Motorcycle for orders under 20kg
Pass selected serviceType to Lalamove quotation API
Update checkout state to include selected vehicle type
Vehicle selection persists during checkout flow

stories.title: Optimize Shop Page with Server-Side Pagination
acceptanceCriteria: Replace fetch-all-then-slice with GROQ pagination using offset/limit
Load 24 products per page initially
Load More button fetches next 24 products
Maintain total product count display
Existing filters (category, price, sort) still work with pagination
Loading skeleton shown during page load

stories.title: Optimize Wishlist Page Product Fetching
acceptanceCriteria: Replace fetch-ALL-products-then-filter with targeted GROQ query
Add wishlistProductsQuery to queries.ts: fetch only products matching wishlist IDs
Wishlist page passes wishlist IDs to Sanity query
Performance improvement: only fetches products the user has wishlisted

stories.title: Add Move to Cart from Wishlist
acceptanceCriteria: When user clicks Add to Cart on wishlisted item, also remove from wishlist
Show toast: Moved to cart
Wishlist count decrements, cart count increments
Works for both guest and authenticated users

stories.title: Lalamove Client Unit Tests
acceptanceCriteria: Test HMAC signature generation with known values
Test getQuotation request formatting
Test placeOrder request formatting
Test error handling for API failures
Test vehicle type selection passed to quotation
Mock fetch for all API calls
All tests passing

stories.title: Delivery Tracking Page Unit Tests
acceptanceCriteria: Test page renders with order data
Test auth redirect for unauthenticated users
Test order not found state
Test order status display with correct badges
Test Lalamove status timeline rendering
Test driver details card when driver assigned
Test auto-refresh polling for active deliveries
Test back to orders navigation
All tests passing

stories.title: StatusTimeline Component Unit Tests
acceptanceCriteria: Test all 4 stages render correctly
Test ASSIGNING_DRIVER shows first stage as current
Test ON_GOING shows second stage as current, first completed
Test PICKED_UP shows third stage as current
Test COMPLETED shows all stages completed
Test CANCELED shows special canceled state
Test mobile and desktop timeline variants
All tests passing

stories.title: Shop Page and Wishlist Page Tests
acceptanceCriteria: Test shop page renders product grid
Test Load More button loads additional products
Test filter controls work
Test wishlist page renders wishlisted products
Test empty wishlist state
All tests passing
